productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Pack of 2 T-shirts
description: Pack of two t-shirts Red and green t-shirts made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck and graphic on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent Do not bleach Remove promptly after washing and avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge your little one in happy feelings with these palm tree T-shirts from gini and jony. The "attitude and intelligent" lettering on the chest fills this tee with a positive spirit. Team this with shorts or jeans and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on the skin and keeps your little one fresh and comfortable all day.
